## Document

Which file in `docs/` is affected?

## Issue Type

- [ ] Missing documentation
- [ ] Outdated documentation (implementation diverged)
- [ ] Incorrect documentation
- [ ] New document needed

## Description

What is wrong or missing?

## Proposed Resolution

What should the documentation say?

## Related

Links to related issues, RFCs, or Decision Log entries.
